backstory.original: Shandie grew up on the rough streets of the Lower City of Baldur's Gate. She quickly learned that if she wanted to survive, she needed to be fast on her feet and even faster with her wit and weaponry. The first time Shandie saw a bowmaster gracefully launch an arrow into a bull's-eye, she knew she had to master archery. With years of practice under her belt, any opponents underestimating this stealthy halfling will soon realize how dangerous she is as a volley of arrows bear down on them unexpectedly from shadowy corners.
backstory.display: 珊蒂在博德之门贫民窟的崎岖街道上长大。她很快就明白，如果想生存下去，她的脚步必须快，而她的智慧和武器要更快。珊蒂第一次看到弓箭手优雅地将箭射入靶心时，她就知道自己必须掌握射箭的技术。在多年的练习下，对于任何低估这个隐匿半身人的对手来说，当箭幕从阴暗的角落里出其不意地射向他们，他们很快就会意识到她有多危险。

description.original: Shandie fires an arrow at a random enemy.
description.display: 珊蒂向一名随机敌人射出一支箭。

description.original: Shandie throws smoke grenades and caltrops onto the battlefield, causing enemies to bleed and miss 50% of their attacks for 10 seconds.
description.display: 珊蒂向战场扔出烟雾弹和铁蒺藜，使敌人流血并有 50% 几率攻击失误，持续 10 秒。

longDescription.original: Shandie bends the odds in the party's favor, throwing smoke grenades and caltrops onto the battlefield, causing enemies to take the ultimate's full damage over 10 seconds and having a 50% chance to miss their attacks during that time.
longDescription.display: 珊蒂为队伍扭转乾坤，向战场投掷烟雾弹和铁蒺藜，使敌人在 10 秒内受到杀招的全部伤害，并有 50% 几率攻击失误。

description.original: When the formation hasn't come under attack in 60 seconds, increase the game speed by 25%
description.display: 如果阵型在 60 秒内未受到攻击，游戏速度加快 25%。

description.original: When the formation is under attack, Shandie switches to an AOE attack and buffs the formation based on the number of enemies hit
description.display: 阵型受到攻击时，珊蒂切换为范围攻击，根据命中的敌人数量为阵型提供增益。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions within 2 slots of Shandie by $(amount)% for each Champion adjacent to Shandie with a DEX of 15 or higher
每有一名敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士与珊蒂相邻，珊蒂与相邻 2 格之内的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Shandie buffs Champions within two slots of herself based on the DEX scores of adjacent allies.
tipText.display: 根据相邻盟友的敏捷数值，珊蒂使自身周围两个格位内的勇士获得增益。

description.desc: Increases the game speed by $amount% when the formation hasn't been under attack for $delay seconds.^$dash_time_until_bonus_desc
当阵型在 $delay 秒内未被攻击时，游戏速度提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Shandie makes your formation move faster when it's not under attack. Use her to reach your wall faster!
tipText.display: 珊蒂使阵型在未受到攻击时移动速度加快。利用她来更快地抵达围墙！

description.pre: When the formation is under attack, Shandie attacks with explosive arrows. The damage of all Champions is increased by $(amount)% times the largest number of enemies Shandie has hit with a single Explosive Arrow in the current area.
当阵型受到攻击时，珊蒂使用爆裂箭发动攻击。所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)% 乘以珊蒂在当前区域中使用一支爆裂箭命中的最大敌人数量。

description.desc: The base effect of Agile Allies is additively increased by $(amount)% for each Heroes' of Baldur's Gate affiliated Champion in the formation.
阵型中的每位“博德之门的英雄们”勇士均使“敏捷盟友”的基础效果提高 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 博德之门的英雄们勇士

specializationDescription.original: Shandie focuses on further increasing nearby Champions' damage for each Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champion in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 阵型中的每位“博德之门的英雄们”勇士均使珊蒂专注于进一步提高附近勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount%.

specializationDescription.original: Shandie focuses on buffing the party when it comes under attack.
specializationDescription.display: 阵型受到攻击时，珊蒂专注于强化队伍。

description.desc: The base effect of Agile Allies is additively increased by 100% for each Neutral/Evil Champion adjacent to Shandie.
与珊蒂相邻的每位中立/邪恶勇士均使“敏捷盟友”的基础效果提高 100%，以加算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Shandie focuses on further increasing nearby Champions' damage for each adjacent Neutral/Evil Champion.
specializationDescription.display: 每位相邻的中立/邪恶勇士均使珊蒂专注于进一步提高附近勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $source fires explosive arrows when the formation is under attack. For each enemy hit, $source increases the damage of the column in front of her by $(amount)%.^$explosive_arrow_desc
$source在阵型受到攻击时发射爆裂箭，每命中一名敌人，$source即为处于她前列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害^$explosive_arrow_desc
Increases the damage of Champions within 2 slots of $source by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion adjacent to $source with a DEX of 15 or higher

effect_keys.old_unused_override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion next to Shandie with DEX 15 or greater.

description.desc: 每有一名敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士与$source相邻，即提升与$source相邻 2 格之内的勇士 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害

effect_keys.old_unused_override_key_desc: Increases the damage of $target by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion next to Shandie with DEX 15 or greater.

description.original: C'mon! Get a move on! I've got places to be!
description.display: 来吧！动起来！我还有好几个地方要去！

description.original: Get behind me! I'll hold them off!
description.display: 躲我身后！我来挡住他们！

description.original: If you can dodge an arrow, you can- wait. Can you dodge an arrow?
description.display: 如果你能躲开一支箭，你就能--等等，你能躲开箭吗？

description.original: If you can't keep up, don't bother me.
description.display: 如果你们跟不上，就别烦我。

description.original: You remember when we faced that bone devil, right?
description.display: 你还记得我们遇到骨魔的时候，对吗？

description.original: Years of working the streets of Baldur's Gate has taught me a few things.
description.display: 在博德之门街道上工作多年，我学会了几件事。

description.original: Krydle and I have been known to pull a con or two.
description.display: 克莱达和我因为筹划过一两个骗局而出名。

description.original: This one's too dangerous for you, but not for THEM!
description.display: 这个对你来说太危险了，但对他们来说没问题！

description.original: The wig says 'power' to bullywugs.
description.display: 假发对狂蛙人说“权力”。

description.original: I've got precision, but I don't need it with this!
description.display: 我需要精度，但我不需要它！

description.original: I'm too quick to catch!
description.display: 我是抓不住的风！

description.original: I could do this all day!
description.display: 我可以持续一整天！

effects.description: Decreases the time it takes Shandie's Dash ability to trigger from 30 seconds to 10 seconds.

description.original: I never miss.
description.display: 我从不失手。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Shandie's specializations by $amount%

description.original: I don't have friends. I've got clowder.
description.display: 我没有朋友。我有一群猫。

effects.description: Shandie also counts as a Tabaxi and increases the effect of Agile Allies by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

description.original: This next shot is going to sting.
description.display: 接下来这一击会很痛哦。

description.original: It smells like it got lost in the Chionthar River.
description.display: 这地图感觉像是在冲萨河泡过澡一样。

description.original: I left Minsc & Boo in charge of directions. I only made that mistake ONCE.
description.display: 曾经有一次我让明斯克和布布来导航。我再也不会犯同样的错误了。

description.original: I've marked all our hideouts!
description.display: 我将所有的安全屋都记在地图上了！

description.original: Walking around with this is like walking around with an open pouch of gold. You're a mark.
description.display: 带着它赶路就像是拿着一箱金币招摇过市一样。顿时成了香饽饽。

description.original: The shadows are my long lost friends when I visit my old haunts.
description.display: 每当我回去探访老地方时，我都选择潜行在阴暗处。

description.original: I saw them! They went that way! Sucker.
description.display: 我看见他们跑向那个方向了！混蛋。

description.original: It's weighted so that my arms have a bit more freedom to stretch!
description.display: 这斗篷的特点就是沉重，这样我的手臂才可以更灵活地拉伸弓弩。

name.display: 博德之门英雄们的斗篷

description.original: Nerys always looks jealous when I wear this. I've commissioned one for her.
description.display: 妮莉丝总是很羡慕我的这件斗篷。所以我也给她订造了一件。

description.original: I reinforced the grip with rat fur.
description.display: 我用老鼠毛皮强化过它的弓把。

description.original: Practice makes perfect!
description.display: 熟能生巧！

description.original: Phandar trees are rare, but they make wonderful bows!
description.display: 旋枝树是很罕见的树木，但绝对是顶级的制弓材料！

description.original: With this and my Quiver of Ehlonna, no enemy stands a chance!
description.display: 有它和艾罗娜箭囊的相助，我绝对是所向披靡！

description.original: Sure, you can use them. As long as you don't care if half of the city hears you.
description.display: 穿是当然能穿。只不过方圆百米都能听见你的脚步声而已。

description.original: See this gouge? I slammed into a rooftop while evading Flaming Fist mercs.
description.display: 瞧见鞋上这个洞没？这是我逃避烈焰之拳佣兵团的追杀时撞到屋顶留下的。

description.original: A swift kick to the shin tends to get folks to talk.
description.display: 猛地一脚踢向对方的胫骨，保证再顽强的敌人都会乖乖求饶。

description.original: You want it done fast, you say?
description.display: 你刚才说时间紧迫对吗？

description.original: Ever stepped on one in the middle of the night? That'll wake you up!
description.display: 有试过三更半夜踩到铁蒺藜吗？绝对能让你睡意全无！

description.original: Always keep 'em close. You never know when you're being followed.
description.display: 一定要随身携带。天知道什么时候会被人跟踪。

description.original: For when you really want to make it clear they should BACK OFF.
description.display: 让人知道你是比不好惹更加不好惹的人。

description.original: First they tear, then you tear.
description.display: 首先它们会撕开你的皮肤，然后再撕开你的泪腺。

description.original: This thing survived a fireball!
description.display: 这玩意曾经在火球术攻击下安然无恙！

description.original: Gear, Rope, Rations, it's all - hey, where did my rations go!
description.display: 装备、绳索、干粮，全都--咦，我的干粮去哪了？！

description.original: Krydle borrowed it, and now the straps aren't right!
description.display: 之前借给了克莱达用，结果肩带都给弄歪了！

description.original: It's full of hidden pouches!
description.display: 里头含有多个隐蔽的口袋！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Halfing Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Shandie grew up on the rough streets of the Lower City of Baldur's Gate. She quickly learned that if she wanted to survive, she needed to be fast on her feet and even faster with her wit and weaponry. The first time Shandie saw a bowmaster gracefully launch an arrow into a bull's-eye, she knew she had to master archery. With years of practice under her belt, any opponents underestimating this stealthy halfling will soon realize how dangerous she is as a volley of arrows bear down on them unexpectedly from shadowy corners.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Shandie increases your formation's speed while it's not under attack, and increases its damage when you are under attack.

event_upgrades.description: When the formation hasn't come under attack in 60 seconds, increase the game speed by 25%

event_upgrades.name: Explosive Arrow
event_upgrades.description: When the formation is under attack, Shandie switches to an AOE attack and buffs the formation based on the number of enemies hit

display.description: 带着它赶路就像是拿着一箱金币招摇过市一样。顿时成了香饽饽。

display.name: 盗贼的斗篷

display.name: 弓箭手斗篷
display.description: 这斗篷的特点就是沉重，这样我的手臂才可以更灵活地拉伸弓弩。

original.name: Heroes of Baldur's Gate Cloak
original.description: Nerys always looks jealous when I wear this. I've commissioned one for her.

display.name: 博德之门英雄们的斗篷
display.description: 妮莉丝总是很羡慕我的这件斗篷。所以我也给她订造了一件。

original.name: Ratty Shortbow

display.name: 老旧的短弓
display.description: 我用老鼠毛皮强化过它的弓把。

original.name: Practice Bow
original.description: Practice makes perfect!

display.name: 教练弓
display.description: 熟能生巧！

original.name: Phandar Bow
original.description: Phandar trees are rare, but they make wonderful bows!

display.name: 旋枝木弓
display.description: 旋枝树是很罕见的树木，但绝对是顶级的制弓材料！

original.name: Sylvan Bow
original.description: With this and my Quiver of Ehlonna, no enemy stands a chance!

display.name: 森林弓
display.description: 有它和艾罗娜箭囊的相助，我绝对是所向披靡！

original.name: Patched Boots
original.description: Sure, you can use them. As long as you don't care if half of the city hears you.

display.name: 缝补过的靴子
display.description: 穿是当然能穿。只不过方圆百米都能听见你的脚步声而已。

original.name: Child's Boots
original.description: See this gouge? I slammed into a rooftop while evading Flaming Fist mercs.

display.name: 孩童靴子
display.description: 瞧见鞋上这个洞没？这是我逃避烈焰之拳佣兵团的追杀时撞到屋顶留下的。

original.name: Reinforced Boots
original.description: A swift kick to the shin tends to get folks to talk.

display.name: 强化之靴
display.description: 猛地一脚踢向对方的胫骨，保证再顽强的敌人都会乖乖求饶。

original.name: Boots of Speed
original.description: You want it done fast, you say?

display.name: 速度之靴
display.description: 你刚才说时间紧迫对吗？

original.name: Common Caltrops
original.description: Ever stepped on one in the middle of the night? That'll wake you up!

display.name: 普通铁蒺藜
display.description: 有试过三更半夜踩到铁蒺藜吗？绝对能让你睡意全无！

original.name: Caltrop Collection
original.description: Always keep 'em close. You never know when you're being followed.

display.name: 铁蒺藜藏品
display.description: 一定要随身携带。天知道什么时候会被人跟踪。

original.name: Hooked Caltrops
original.description: For when you really want to make it clear they should BACK OFF.

display.name: 带钩铁蒺藜
display.description: 让人知道你是比不好惹更加不好惹的人。

original.name: The Tear-makers
original.description: First they tear, then you tear.

display.name: 催泪者
display.description: 首先它们会撕开你的皮肤，然后再撕开你的泪腺。

original.name: Lucky Pack
original.description: This thing survived a fireball!

display.name: 幸运背包
display.description: 这玩意曾经在火球术攻击下安然无恙！

original.name: Holey Pack
original.description: Gear, Rope, Rations, it's all - hey, where did my rations go!

display.name: 多孔背包
display.description: 装备、绳索、干粮，全都--咦，我的干粮去哪了？！

original.name: Unbalanced Pack
original.description: Krydle borrowed it, and now the straps aren't right!

display.name: 不均衡的背包
display.description: 之前借给了克莱达用，结果肩带都给弄歪了！

original.name: Baldur's Gate Burglar's Pack
original.description: It's full of hidden pouches!

display.name: 博德之门窃贼背包
display.description: 里头含有多个隐蔽的口袋！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Halfing Champions by $(amount)%
使所有半身人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位敏捷大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%
使所有混乱阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
